summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his latest video, explicitly stating 'The Bottom Is In' and forecasting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: He argues that the crypto market has bottomed, challenging the conventional 4-year cycle theory with a different framework for identifying market turns. He points to STRC as a specific catalyst representing marginal buying that could propel BTC to higher prices, marking a shift from his previous short-biased stance.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
